table::comment.name: comment
table::comment.ddl: DEFINE TABLE comment TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL COMMENT "Task comments" PERMISSIONS FOR select, create WHERE task.project.owner = $auth.id OR task.project.settings.isPublic = true OR task.project IN $auth->member->project FOR update, delete WHERE author = $auth.id;

field:comment:task.name: task
field:comment:task.ddl: DEFINE FIELD task ON TABLE comment TYPE record<task>;

field:comment:author.name: author
field:comment:author.ddl: DEFINE FIELD author ON TABLE comment TYPE record<user> DEFAULT $auth.id READONLY;

field:comment:body.name: body
field:comment:body.ddl: DEFINE FIELD body ON TABLE comment TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) >= 1;

field:comment:createdAt.name: createdAt
field:comment:createdAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD createdAt ON TABLE comment TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY COMMENT "When posted";

table::project.name: project
table::project.ddl: DEFINE TABLE project TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL COMMENT "Project workspaces" PERMISSIONS FOR select WHERE owner = $auth.id OR settings.isPublic = true OR id IN $auth->member->project FOR create, update, delete WHERE owner = $auth.id;

field:project:owner.name: owner
field:project:owner.ddl: DEFINE FIELD owner ON TABLE project TYPE record<user> DEFAULT $auth.id READONLY;

field:project:name.name: name
field:project:name.ddl: DEFINE FIELD name ON TABLE project TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) >= 1;

field:project:description.name: description
field:project:description.ddl: DEFINE FIELD description ON TABLE project TYPE option<string>;

field:project:color.name: color
field:project:color.ddl: DEFINE FIELD color ON TABLE project TYPE string DEFAULT "#6366f1";

field:project:order.name: order
field:project:order.ddl: DEFINE FIELD order ON TABLE project TYPE float DEFAULT 0;

field:project:tags.name: tags
field:project:tags.ddl: DEFINE FIELD tags ON TABLE project TYPE array<string> DEFAULT [];

field:project:settings.name: settings
field:project:settings.ddl: DEFINE FIELD settings ON TABLE project TYPE object DEFAULT {};

field:project:settings.isPublic.name: settings.isPublic
field:project:settings.isPublic.ddl: DEFINE FIELD settings.isPublic ON TABLE project TYPE bool DEFAULT false;

field:project:settings.defaultView.name: settings.defaultView
field:project:settings.defaultView.ddl: DEFINE FIELD settings.defaultView ON TABLE project TYPE "list" | "board" DEFAULT "list";

field:project:createdAt.name: createdAt
field:project:createdAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD createdAt ON TABLE project TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY;

table::tag.name: tag
table::tag.ddl: DEFINE TABLE tag TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL COMMENT "Reusable task labels" PERMISSIONS FOR select, create, update, delete WHERE project.owner = $auth.id OR project IN $auth->member->project;

field:tag:project.name: project
field:tag:project.ddl: DEFINE FIELD project ON TABLE tag TYPE record<project>;

field:tag:name.name: name
field:tag:name.ddl: DEFINE FIELD name ON TABLE tag TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) >= 1;

index:tag:tag_name_idx.name: tag_name_idx
index:tag:tag_name_idx.ddl: DEFINE INDEX tag_name_idx ON TABLE tag FIELDS name UNIQUE;

field:tag:color.name: color
field:tag:color.ddl: DEFINE FIELD color ON TABLE tag TYPE string DEFAULT "#999999";

table::task.name: task
table::task.ddl: DEFINE TABLE task TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL COMMENT "Project tasks" PERMISSIONS FOR select WHERE project.owner = $auth.id OR project.settings.isPublic = true OR project IN $auth->member->project FOR create, update, delete WHERE project.owner = $auth.id OR project IN $auth->member->project;

field:task:project.name: project
field:task:project.ddl: DEFINE FIELD project ON TABLE task TYPE record<project>;

field:task:title.name: title
field:task:title.ddl: DEFINE FIELD title ON TABLE task TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) >= 1 COMMENT "Short summary";

field:task:description.name: description
field:task:description.ddl: DEFINE FIELD description ON TABLE task TYPE option<string>;

field:task:status.name: status
field:task:status.ddl: DEFINE FIELD status ON TABLE task TYPE "todo" | "in_progress" | "done" | "archived" DEFAULT "todo";

field:task:priority.name: priority
field:task:priority.ddl: DEFINE FIELD priority ON TABLE task TYPE "low" | "medium" | "high" | "urgent" DEFAULT "medium";

field:task:estimate.name: estimate
field:task:estimate.ddl: DEFINE FIELD estimate ON TABLE task TYPE option<duration>;

field:task:assignees.name: assignees
field:task:assignees.ddl: DEFINE FIELD assignees ON TABLE task TYPE array<record<user>> DEFAULT [];

field:task:labels.name: labels
field:task:labels.ddl: DEFINE FIELD labels ON TABLE task TYPE array<string> DEFAULT [];

field:task:dueAt.name: dueAt
field:task:dueAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD dueAt ON TABLE task TYPE option<datetime>;

field:task:completedAt.name: completedAt
field:task:completedAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD completedAt ON TABLE task TYPE option<datetime | null>;

field:task:createdBy.name: createdBy
field:task:createdBy.ddl: DEFINE FIELD createdBy ON TABLE task TYPE record<user> DEFAULT $auth.id READONLY;

field:task:createdAt.name: createdAt
field:task:createdAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD createdAt ON TABLE task TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY;

field:task:updatedAt.name: updatedAt
field:task:updatedAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD updatedAt ON TABLE task TYPE datetime VALUE time::now();

event:task:stamp_completed_at.name: stamp_completed_at

table::user.name: user
table::user.ddl: DEFINE TABLE user TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL COMMENT "Application end users" PERMISSIONS FOR select WHERE $auth.id != NONE FOR create NONE FOR update, delete WHERE id = $auth.id;

field:user:name.name: name
field:user:name.ddl: DEFINE FIELD name ON TABLE user TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) >= 1;

field:user:email.name: email
field:user:email.ddl: DEFINE FIELD email ON TABLE user TYPE string ASSERT string::is_email($value);

index:user:user_email_idx.name: user_email_idx
index:user:user_email_idx.ddl: DEFINE INDEX user_email_idx ON TABLE user FIELDS email UNIQUE;

field:user:passhash.name: passhash
field:user:passhash.ddl: DEFINE FIELD passhash ON TABLE user TYPE string PERMISSIONS NONE;

field:user:createdAt.name: createdAt
field:user:createdAt.ddl: DEFINE FIELD createdAt ON TABLE user TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY COMMENT "Signup time";

table::depends_on.name: depends_on
table::depends_on.ddl: DEFINE TABLE depends_on TYPE RELATION FROM task TO task SCHEMAFULL PERMISSIONS FOR select, create, delete WHERE in.project.owner = $auth.id OR in.project IN $auth->member->project;

field:depends_on:kind.name: kind
field:depends_on:kind.ddl: DEFINE FIELD kind ON TABLE depends_on TYPE "blocks" | "relates_to" DEFAULT "blocks";

table::member.name: member
table::member.ddl: DEFINE TABLE member TYPE RELATION FROM user TO project SCHEMAFULL PERMISSIONS FOR select WHERE in = $auth.id OR out.owner = $auth.id FOR create, update WHERE out.owner = $auth.id FOR delete WHERE out.owner = $auth.id OR in = $auth.id;

field:member:role.name: role
field:member:role.ddl: DEFINE FIELD role ON TABLE member TYPE "owner" | "editor" | "viewer" DEFAULT "viewer";

field:member:since.name: since
field:member:since.ddl: DEFINE FIELD since ON TABLE member TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY;

table::watch.name: watch
table::watch.ddl: DEFINE TABLE watch TYPE RELATION FROM user TO task SCHEMAFULL PERMISSIONS FOR select, create, delete WHERE in = $auth.id;

field:watch:since.name: since
field:watch:since.ddl: DEFINE FIELD since ON TABLE watch TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY;

access::account.name: account
